status.summary: Tyrion-in-a-box quality gates for AI-generated code; 1.0 is out, 1.1 wraps up the verb-driven workflow and the buff/scour split. Fixed Windows build timeout in lock PID check.
blockers: Pin GitHub Actions in barnacle templates to commit SHAs before tagging v1.1.
Settle on the final myopia:ignored-feedback report format for AI agents.
next: Cut v1.1.0 once the buff helper has docs and one more dogfooded PR.
Publish the `sm sail` walkthrough to the docs site.
Push the heraldic splash + Tyrion essay link into the README hero.
